columns.name: AuthenticationInfoPrincipalEmail
columns.description: The email of the authenticated identity making the request

columns.name: AuthorizationInfo
columns.description: Authorization details such as permission name, granted status, and resource type

columns.name: AuthzPolicyInfoPolicies
columns.description: The list of Authorization policies that match the request

columns.name: AuthzPolicyInfoResult
columns.description: Stores information about the Authorization Policy result

columns.name: BackendTargetProjectNumber
columns.description: Holds the project number where the backend target-backend service or backend bucket-has been created

columns.name: _BilledSize
columns.description: The record size in bytes

columns.name: CacheDecision
columns.description: Indicates caching decisions taken

columns.name: CacheID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the cache entry associated with this response

columns.name: EnforcedEdgeSecurityPolicyConfiguredAction
columns.description: The configured action that was evaluated in the edge security policy

columns.name: EnforcedEdgeSecurityPolicyName
columns.description: The name of the edge security policy that was applied to the request

columns.name: EnforcedEdgeSecurityPolicyOutcome
columns.description: The outcome of applying the policy

columns.name: EnforcedEdgeSecurityPolicyPriority
columns.description: The priority value of the rule within the edge security policy that matched the request

columns.name: ErrorBackendStatusDetails
columns.description: Backend-specific error details when a request fails or is served with an error response

columns.name: ErrorService
columns.description: Holds the backend service that provided the custom error response

columns.name: HttpRequestCacheFillBytes
columns.description: Number of bytes written to the cache from this response

columns.name: HttpRequestCacheHit
columns.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the response was served from cache

columns.name: HttpRequestCacheLookup
columns.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the request attempted a cache lookup before contacting the backend

columns.name: HttpRequestLatency
columns.description: The latency or total time taken to process the request

columns.name: HttpRequestRemoteIP
columns.description: The IP address of the client that made the request

columns.name: HttpRequestRequestMethod
columns.description: HTTP method used for the request

columns.name: HttpRequestRequestSize
columns.description: Size of the incoming HTTP request in bytes

columns.name: HttpRequestRequestUrl
columns.description: Full URL that was requested

columns.name: HttpRequestResponseSize
columns.description: Size of the HTTP response payload sent to the client, in bytes

columns.name: HttpRequestServerIP
columns.description: IP address of the server (or Google Front End) that processed the request

columns.name: HttpRequestStatus
columns.description: HTTP status code returned by the server

columns.name: HttpRequestUserAgent
columns.description: User agent string from the HTTP request header

columns.name: InsertID
columns.description: A unique identifier for the log entry assigned by the logging system

columns.name: _IsBillable
columns.description: Specifies whether ingesting the data is billable. When _IsBillable isfalseingestion isn't billed to your Azure account

columns.name: JsonPayloadType
columns.description: The protobuf type URL describing the type of jsonPayload content in the log

columns.name: LabelsAPIRootTriggerID
columns.description: The root trigger ID identifying the origin request that caused this log entry

columns.name: LoadBalancingScheme
columns.description: Holds a string that describes which load balancing scheme was used to route the request

columns.name: LogName
columns.description: The full resource name of the log to which this entry belongs

columns.name: MethodName
columns.description: The name of the API method invoked

columns.name: NumResponseItems
columns.description: The number of items returned in a list response

columns.name: OperationFirst
columns.description: Boolean flag indicating this log entry is the first record in a long-running operation

columns.name: OperationID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the operation

columns.name: OperationLast
columns.description: Boolean flag indicating this log entry is the final record in a long-running operation

columns.name: OperationProducer
columns.description: The service that initiated and owns the operation

columns.name: OverrideResponseCode
columns.description: Holds the override response code applied to the response sent to the client

columns.name: PayloadType
columns.description: Type URL of the request or response payload

columns.name: ReceiveTimestamp
columns.description: The time the log entry was received by the logging system

columns.name: RemoteIP
columns.description: The IP address of the client as seen by the load balancer

columns.name: RequestBackends
columns.description: Configuration for backend groups

columns.name: RequestCDNPolicyCacheKeyPolicyIncludeHost
columns.description: Whether the host is included in the cache key

columns.name: RequestCDNPolicyCacheKeyPolicyIncludeProtocol
columns.description: Whether protocol is included in the cache key

columns.name: RequestCDNPolicyCacheKeyPolicyIncludeQueryString
columns.description: Whether the query string is included in the cache key

columns.name: RequestCDNPolicyCacheMode
columns.description: Cache mode setting

columns.name: RequestCDNPolicyClientTtl
columns.description: Time-to-live set on responses for clients

columns.name: RequestCDNPolicyDefaultTtl
columns.description: Default TTL applied when no caching headers are set

columns.name: RequestCDNPolicyMaxTtl
columns.description: Maximum allowed TTL for cached responses

columns.name: RequestCDNPolicyNegativeCaching
columns.description: Boolean indicating if negative caching is enabled

columns.name: RequestCDNPolicyServeWhileStale
columns.description: Duration responses are served while stale

columns.name: RequestCDNPolicySignedUrlCacheMaxAgeSec
columns.description: Cache TTL for signed URLs in seconds

columns.name: RequestCompressionMode
columns.description: Specifies whether and how compression is applied

columns.name: RequestConnectionDrainingTimeoutSec
columns.description: Time in seconds for draining connections during backend removal

columns.name: RequestDescription
columns.description: A custom description associated with the backend service configuration

columns.name: RequestEnableCDN
columns.description: Boolean indicating if Cloud CDN is enabled for the backend service

columns.name: RequestFingerprint
columns.description: Fingerprint of the request configuration, used for optimistic locking

columns.name: RequestGroup
columns.description: The reference to instance group used by the backend service

columns.name: RequestHealthChecks
columns.description: List of health check resources attached to the backend service

columns.name: RequestIPAddressSelectionPolicy
columns.description: Specifies IP address family for the backend

columns.name: RequestKeyName
columns.description: The name of the key used in the request

columns.name: RequestLoadBalancingScheme
columns.description: Load balancing scheme used

columns.name: RequestLocalityLbPolicy
columns.description: Locality-based load balancing strategy

columns.name: RequestLogConfigEnable
columns.description: Boolean to enable request logging

columns.name: RequestLogConfigSampleRate
columns.description: Sampling rate for log entries when logging is enabled

columns.name: RequestMetadataCallerIP
columns.description: IP address of the request initiator

columns.name: RequestMetadataCallerSuppliedUserAgent
columns.description: User agent string of the request initiator

columns.name: RequestMetadataDestinationAttributes
columns.description: Attributes of the destination, often empty in public APIs

columns.name: RequestMetadataRequestAttributesAuth
columns.description: Authentication metadata for the request

columns.name: RequestMetadataRequestAttributesReason
columns.description: Encoded reason for the request

columns.name: RequestMetadataRequestAttributesTime
columns.description: Time when the request was initiated

columns.name: RequestName
columns.description: The name assigned to the resource in the request

columns.name: RequestPortName
columns.description: The named port of the backend service

columns.name: RequestProtocol
columns.description: The protocol used

columns.name: RequestSecurityPolicy
columns.description: The name or full path of the security policy attached to the backend service

columns.name: RequestSessionAffinity
columns.description: Affinity setting used to keep sessions on the same backend

columns.name: RequestTimeoutSec
columns.description: Timeout value (in seconds) for the backend service

columns.name: RequestType
columns.description: Type of the request payload object

columns.name: ResourceLabelsBackendBucketID
columns.description: Holds the ResourceLabelsBackendBucketID value recorded in the CDN or load balancer log

columns.name: ResourceLabelsBackendServiceID
columns.description: The unique identifier for the GCE backend service

columns.name: ResourceLabelsBackendServiceName
columns.description: The name of the backend service

columns.name: ResourceLabelsForwardingRuleName
columns.description: The name of the forwarding rule object

columns.name: ResourceLabelsLocation
columns.description: The geographical or regional location of the resource

columns.name: ResourceLabelsProjectID
columns.description: The identifier of the Google Cloud project associated with this resource

columns.name: ResourceLabelsTargetProxyName
columns.description: The name of the target proxy object referenced by the forwarding rule

columns.name: ResourceLabelsUrlMapName
columns.description: The name of the URL map object configured to select a backend service

columns.name: ResourceLabelsZone
columns.description: The zone in which the load balancer is running

columns.name: ResourceLocationCurrentLocations
columns.description: Region or location associated with the resource

columns.name: ResponseID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the response or operation

columns.name: ResponseInsertTime
columns.description: Time when the response operation was created

columns.name: ResponseName
columns.description: Name assigned to the long-running operation

columns.name: ResponseOperationType
columns.description: Type of the operation performed

columns.name: ResponseProgress
columns.description: Progress of the operation in percentage

columns.name: ResponseSelfLink
columns.description: URI of the operation

columns.name: ResponseSelfLinkWithID
columns.description: URI of the operation with ID appended

columns.name: ResponseStartTime
columns.description: Time when the operation started

columns.name: ResponseStatus
columns.description: Status of the operation

columns.name: ResponseTargetID
columns.description: ID of the target resource affected by the operation

columns.name: ResponseTargetLink
columns.description: URI of the affected resource

columns.name: ResponseType
columns.description: Type of the response object returned

columns.name: ResponseUser
columns.description: User who initiated the operation.

columns.name: ServiceName
columns.description: The Google service processing the request

columns.name: Severity
columns.description: Indicates the importance or severity level of the log entry

columns.name: SourceSystem
columns.description: The type of agent the event was collected by. For example,OpsManagerfor Windows agent, either direct connect or Operations Manager,Linuxfor all Linux agents, orAzurefor Azure Diagnostics

columns.name: SpanID
columns.description: Identifier of the span within a trace

columns.name: StatusDetails
columns.description: Holds a string that explains why the load balancer returned the HTTP status that it did

columns.name: TenantId
columns.description: The Log Analytics workspace ID

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: The timestamp when the log entry was fetched into Microsoft Sentinel

columns.name: Timestamp
columns.description: The time when the first layer GFE receives the request

columns.name: Trace
columns.description: Identifier of the trace

columns.name: Type
columns.description: The name of the table
